# Beudox HR - Technical Context for AI Assistants

## Architecture Overview

Beudox HR is a modern React-based HR management system built with TypeScript, using Vite as the build tool. The application follows a component-based architecture with clear separation of concerns:

- **Frontend**: Single-page application with client-side routing
- **Backend**: Supabase (PostgreSQL + Auth + Real-time + Edge Functions)
- **UI**: shadcn/ui design system built on Radix UI primitives
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS with custom design tokens
- **State Management**: React Context for auth, TanStack Query for server state

## Key Architectural Patterns

### Authentication & Authorization
- Supabase Auth handles user sessions and password management
- Role-based access control with 5 roles: employee, hr_manager, finance_manager, team_lead, ceo
- Route protection via `ProtectedRoute` component that checks auth state and permissions
- Employee data fetched once on login and stored in AuthContext to avoid repeated queries

### Component Structure
- Layout components (AppLayout, AppSidebar, TopBar) provide consistent shell
- UI components from shadcn/ui library for consistent design
- Page components represent routes and contain business logic
- Custom hooks encapsulate reusable logic (useAuth, useToast)

### Routing & Navigation
- React Router DOM with BrowserRouter
- Protected routes redirect unauthorized users to dashboard
- Sidebar navigation filtered by role permissions
- Dynamic page titles in TopBar based on current route

### Data Flow
- TanStack Query manages server state with caching and background updates
- Supabase client provides typed database access
- Real-time subscriptions for live data updates
- Form validation using React Hook Form with Zod schemas

## Key Files & Their Purposes

### Core Application Files
- `src/main.tsx`: Application entry point, renders App component
- `src/App.tsx`: Main app component with routing and providers
- `src/index.css`: Global styles with custom CSS variables and font imports

### Authentication
- `src/hooks/useAuth.tsx`: Auth context provider managing Supabase sessions
- `src/pages/Login.tsx`: Login form with email/password
- `src/pages/ForgotPassword.tsx`: Password reset request form
- `src/pages/SetPassword.tsx`: Password setup/reset form

### Layout & Navigation
- `src/components/layout/AppLayout.tsx`: Main layout wrapper with sidebar and content area
- `src/components/layout/AppSidebar.tsx`: Collapsible sidebar with navigation sections
- `src/components/layout/TopBar.tsx`: Top navigation bar with page titles
- `src/lib/role-access.ts`: Role-based route access control logic

### UI Components
- `src/components/BeudoxLogo.tsx`: Logo component with variant support
- `src/components/ui/`: shadcn/ui component library (40+ components)
- `src/components/NavLink.tsx`: React Router NavLink wrapper with active state

### Integrations
- `src/integrations/supabase/client.ts`: Supabase client configuration
- `src/integrations/supabase/types.ts`: Database type definitions
- `supabase/functions/invite-employee/`: Edge function for employee invitations

### Configuration
- `vite.config.ts`: Vite build configuration with React SWC plugin
- `tailwind.config.ts`: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom theme
- `tsconfig.json`: TypeScript configuration
- `package.json`: Dependencies and scripts

## Database Schema (via Supabase)

The application uses several key tables:
- `employees`: Employee profiles linked to auth users
- `employee_roles`: Role assignments for employees
- `roles`: Available role definitions
- `companies`: Company information
- Additional tables for attendance, payroll, projects, etc.

Row Level Security (RLS) policies ensure users can only access their own data and company data.

## Development Workflow

- **Development**: `npm run dev` starts Vite dev server on port 8080
- **Building**: `npm run build` creates production build
- **Testing**: `npm run test` runs Vitest unit tests
- **Linting**: `npm run lint` runs ESLint
- **E2E Testing**: Playwright for end-to-end tests

## Design System

Custom design tokens defined in CSS variables:
- Colors: Primary (#5B3FF8), background (#F6F5FF), sidebar (#1A1240)
- Fonts: Syne for headings, DM Sans for body text
- Spacing and sizing follow a consistent scale
- Dark/light theme support via next-themes

## Security Considerations

- All routes protected by authentication
- Role-based permissions enforced on both client and server (RLS)
- Password policies handled by Supabase Auth
- Environment variables for sensitive configuration
- No sensitive data stored in local storage

## Performance Optimizations

- Vite's fast HMR for development
- Tree-shaking and code splitting
- TanStack Query caching reduces API calls
- Lazy loading for route components
- Optimized bundle with SWC compilation
